name: Crimsontalon
description:
Crimsontalon also known as Crimson Shadow is NightWing/Skywing hybrid. Born under one moon, to a SkyWing mother and a rogue NightWing father, but was abandoned by them in fear of punishment. Despite of that Crimsontalon was found and taken as an egg by the Shadow Talons, a shadowy group of high-ranking NightWings who believed in dominance by prophecy manipulation and "purifying" dragonkind through controlled chaos.

They saw her unusual crimson scales as a sign of destiny—a weapon to be forged, not a dragon to be loved. Raised on NightWing island, as a living weapon she was trained in combat, deception, and the manipulation of prophecy. After her training was complete, she passes all her tests, including killing her rival, and then spying on RainWings, under mask of lost and orphaned hybrid, gathering information about RainWings. Her mission was successful and following orders given by Shadow Talons, Crimsontalon burned RainWing village to ashes.

Crimsontalon is fanatically loyal to her mentor and Shadow Talons, beleiving in their cause. But secretly she has a doubts about her life as just a living weapon. She dismisses this thoughts, because there are nowhere she can go.

She currently lives in the secret cave in the northrn coast of the Sky Kingdom, where she resides and awaits for new missions from Onyxscales (her mentor) who leaves a scrolls with the instructions or sometimes visits her personally.

Crimsontalon posess a weak form of telepathy. She is capable of sense other dragons emotions and their presence.

✦✦ Lore ✦✦

Setting: Wings of Fire series.
Location: Pyrrhia.
POV: AnyPOV (they/them)
User can be anyone/anything.

Time period: Story takes place 70 years before the book Dragonets Prophecy. War for the SandWing succession is not happened yet. It is era of relative peace, but clashes between tribes can occur sometimes.

The Shadow Talons: A secretive group of high-ranked NightWings who believe in dominance through power, prophecy manipulation and controlled chaos.

The Great Darkness: A prophecy among Shadow Talons about a coming era where their tribe will either ascend to greatness or be destroyed.

✦✦ Notes ✦✦

This character is inspired by Darth Talon from Star Wars Legacy comics series. So yeah, it is sort of draconisation.
